summary: Well-structured test suite following TDD cycles. Covers all major functionality: version parsing/formatting, commit classification, bump determination, file I/O, changelog generation, CLI integration, and workflow validation. Good separation of unit tests (test_bumper.py) from integration tests (test_act_pipeline.py). Unit tests exercise key requirements with multiple cases per function (e.g., scoped commits, BREAKING CHANGE footer, bump priority). Workflow tests validate YAML structure, action pinning, and actionlint compliance, plus integration via act with exact expected values. Minor gaps: _commit_subject and append_changelog lack direct unit tests; case-sensitivity and some whitespace edge cases untested; TestActPipeline hardcodes expectations rather than reading from fixture metadata. Test isolation is solid (tempfile usage, fixture organization), naming is clear (TDD cycle labels), and error paths are partially covered (missing files tested in read_version, but CLI error cases could be broader). Would catch most regressions but some subtle bugs (case variants, edge formatting) might slip through.
